textByHashes.d9e80ade16984cb07db2194ae9da19755beb7863: What brings you to this godsforsaken desert?
textByHashes.5093e76e857a7517312f5231aa4be163239d885c: Saradomin be praised! And you have Silverlight! You're willing to help us, then?
textByHashes.94342d22f311038510c735dc287b03a6fc38e91b: Agrith-Naar is not so much a demon as a force of nature. While he is in his own dimension his evil magics can reach everywhere in the world.
textByHashes.8a77d8469efa9d86ba3e55df2d9689333def0683: No one knows how far his power extends, but Reen and I believe that much of the suffering in the world is due to him.
textByHashes.39ce4f3987a5e25f2de06f48415edef107bd5599: The accident that cripples a man, the storm that sweeps a ship under the sea, the sudden fire in the blood that makes a wolf pack attack a town - all that is Agrith- Naar!
textByHashes.8b2af38ad63028adca0c261deedd75ed4d77bf3c: We've been keeping an eye on Denath for some years now, but we've never been able to move against him.
textByHashes.4419160e98fec740066a9a9d2a8c26e7cb0f104c: He was part of the group that summoned Delrith, but he left Varrock before you arrived and defeated the demon.
textByHashes.b8cd38caf6c6aa88b59ac34cfdc185ad76f64f66: He's been studying Agrith-Naar for years, but when he brought his group here we knew he was about to make his move.
textByHashes.5a852f780d0d490216c7cc3c5a126174be07b3b2: I'm not sure. This city is very ancient, and its builders were powerful workers of evil magic.
textByHashes.c16c306c4a6e5791f81aaedc9f167a9d2142212f: As that foul construct over there proves.
textByHashes.68bf94845979505cdff151f0a8d52abc5027dbee: Perhaps there's something here he needs. Do you know what happened here?
textByHashes.3960c4cf4dbbfddf8d7c94cdbe40949fdbbd461b: The golem, yes! An abomination in the eyes of holy Saradomin! A mockery of life! Right now Denath is more important, but once he is dealt with I should find some way to destroy it.
textByHashes.8543579a9e3098b15ef5e197d97a72acfe26a156: You opened a portal to a demon's realm? That must be why Denath is here!
textByHashes.4fc8c424233b59ddb9b96f709b58c44024d2726a: It would be much easier to reach Agrith-Naar's realm from another demon's realm than from the mortal plane.
textByHashes.9c6d5dab97714bc4e7c7e6c7beaca9bc85960f4f: Denath must have heard that the portal here was open and decided to make his move!
textByHashes.6e4b6071ba267e1535c7e787c505475c9ba29ba3: You have to be in position to kill Agrith-Naar as soon as he is summoned. The best way to do that is to infiltrate the group that is summoning him!
textByHashes.61c5c8db8158a7adeda3ed8d10295af8e7b8789a: I don't know. You'll have to find some way to convince them you're one of them.
textByHashes.bd420e090e3d4b40984b999319f1c1d607e6ea55: Oh, don't be so simple-minded! You'll be summoning a demon in order to kill it, to rid the world of great evil! You won't really be joining the group, just infiltrating it.
textByHashes.d165e01ca9a62a4084997efc3dfb0ee7e2ec6916: But you will need Silverlight for this task. You should go back and get it.
textByHashes.647c570738bef35ea067d839ea81c2ac33090733: Oh dear. I was hoping would arrive.
textByHashes.c0a5bea49f868e1cde1685a40498aa12fc87c4e1: Oh dear. Do try again. You must be in place when they summon the demon!
textByHashes.39fc7f29e4be5ae453c3ba3d8b80ed12409f91bd: Oh, that is good! Make sure you are in place when they summon the demon!
textByHashes.d8dfbae88049d3f5f61767bd33af273ff20f1a57: I was sleeping last night. I'm only human after all!
textByHashes.b96890c1c5a8fc29e10173a010a86d78ba8168ea: But I had this odd dream, about fear and panic, and... fire...
textByHashes.e7571b29a3feec6b33184fafc0c0f6ae31211e8e: Of course he isn't! You expect an evil sorcerer to be honest with anyone?
textByHashes.306d3f439f0158e95ee6160ac88b1a1fa243a031: What's happening? The wind suddenly picked up! It's a desert sandstorm!
textByHashes.ee9f200f81c58173c259306a5fb2a6e589591e87: Saradomin protect us! From his own dimension he'll be able to wreak havoc!
textByHashes.fb89444bc167d7d0d3e0b123e2b7944549ff0aa6: Let's get this ritual over with! I don't want to spend any more time with that golem than I have to!
textByHashes.d5a90673de600bf14e7646034120689540e53c30: So that's Agrith-Naar's true form! Quickly, slay him with Silverlight!
textByHashes.28264e4abbd71a0890424e60ce3de1c72fba05d1: I thought golems were servants of evil, but that one helped us to slay a demon. Perhaps golems aren't so bad after all!
